meta.title: New Hero System — Hyper Awakening & Hero Swap
sources: Top War game client (TableManager TABLE dump, scene graph, asset bundles — 2026-05-15)
LocalManager._langData (post-patch full sweep — 24 awakening skill names + 40+ Hero Swap UI strings resolved)
Cocos resources bundle (cc.resources.load + GL readPixels — 36 PNG assets extracted)
Awakening Time event tables: hero_awakening_level (40 rows) + hero_awakening_hero (18 rows) + reward bundles 260512065/100/101 + guide_activity 19101-19112 (2026-05-21)

S4455 Hero Grand Slam extraction (convert table group 260512001, 41 store entries; castle_halo_activity_event rows 101-108; reward bundles 260509001/007/260512001-042; tile-event lang resolved) + Phase III Ella backstory (hero_awake_desc174). 2026-05-21.
meta.scope: Game client extraction 2026-05-18 (Top War global servers patch). Phase I awakening fully live with skill descriptions now LOCALIZED (24 awakening skills × 4 description variants resolved). Phase II/III labels + items remain server-deferred. <id=N> buff name token map decoded from cross-referencing Lv.6 unlock text.

heroesAwakening.summary: Universal upgrade system for any 5★ + Lv.120 hero. Linear enhancement that strengthens own stats and skills. Hero appearance + avatar visually upgraded.
heroesAwakening.unlockCondition: Hero must reach 5 Stars and Level 120
heroesAwakening.uiFlow: Tap [Hero] → [Awakening] tab → 4 Awakening Skills unlocked separately, each promotable
heroesAwakening.skillUnlockLevels: Tier-locked: previewed images show levels 1, 15, 20 visible; final unlock level not yet confirmed
heroesAwakening.stats: Each Awakening tier (Tier 1 → Tier 4 visible in preview) increases Awakening Stats Bonus
heroesAwakening.abilityFormula: Increases active skill damage by N% + abnormal-status enemies take additional X% damage
heroesAwakening.exclusiveBonus: Stacks with hero's existing Exclusive Skill levels (e.g., 'Exclusive 7' = ES level 7 stacks)

items.name: Awakening Choice Chest
items.schedule: 1 chest immediately on event open, more after intervals, 6 total per batch of Awakening Heroes
items.gracePolicy: Forgotten chests accumulate — next collection grants all backlog at once

heroesAwakening.philosophy: Replaces the 'one new hero per month' treadmill that was retired in January 2026. Existing trained main heroes stay relevant.

heroesExchanging.summary: Convert any hero from the 24-hero Exchange Pool into any of the 18 Core Lineup heroes — same army type required.
rules: Same hero type required (Army↔Army, Navy↔Navy, Air↔Air)
Core Lineup: 6 Army, 6 Navy, 6 Air = 18 targets
Strict 1-to-1 — cannot pool multiple donors for one redemption
Cost: completely free, no items required
afterExchange: Original donor hero RESET to initial unlocked state (Lv.1)
Star-upgrade shards 100% convert to target hero shards
Exclusive Skill levels of donor convert to target's Exclusive Skill
Hero Shards + Exclusive Skill shards held in inventory also convert
Hero Combo membership is irrelevant — only type matters
Excess materials (e.g., higher ES on donor than already held on target) retained, not wasted

qa.q: Is the hero exchange free of charge?
qa.a: Yes. The exchange process itself is completely free and does not require any items.

qa.q: Do both heroes need to belong to the same Hero Combo to perform an exchange?
qa.a: No. Hero Combos are irrelevant — only same army type (Army/Navy/Air Force) is required.

qa.q: Is there an Exclusive Skill (ES) level requirement?
qa.a: No hard requirement. ES level is inherited by the new hero, so use your best-developed donor.

qa.q: Can Duke be used to exchange for a hero of any type?
qa.a: No. Duke is a Navy hero, so he can only be exchanged for other Navy heroes in the Core Lineup.

qa.q: If I already have a 5★ ES5 Jett and use a 5★ ES7 Abad to exchange for another Jett, what happens to the overflow?
qa.a: Excess development materials are retained, not wasted.

qa.q: Can I combine multiple existing heroes to exchange for a single hero?
qa.a: No. Hero exchanges are strictly one-to-one, completed in a single transaction.

heroes.name: Sara
heroes.awakeningSkillSource: Discord 2026-04-17 (Jett/Lophy/Sara reveal — image-only, skill text rendered into image)

spotlight.intro: Sara the Prowler and her Meow companion are fully geared up—ready to guard the night. Available June 12, 2025.

heroSkill.name: Superview Guidance
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round of battle, Army units receive 68% HP Boost (entire battle).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from each Army unit, chance to trigger 4 skill attacks dealing 60% damage to 1 random enemy each.
heroSkill.passive: After every regular attack from each unit, 1 stack of Magnetic Pulse (40%) randomly applied to 2-3 enemies. If a target already has the maximum stacks of this hero's Magnetic Pulse, further applications instead deal 10% Magnetic Pulse damage.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Sara's skill effect (without increasing the triggering chance and effect of the passive skill).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Magnetic Pulse applied increases to 3-4. Magnetic Pulse effect raised to 60%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Magnetic Pulse applied increases to 4-5. Direct Magnetic Pulse damage from passive raised to 40%.

spotlight.intro: Rohr the new Army Hero. Available August 14, 2025 (warzones that have finished Terra Aurorae).

heroSkill.name: Hero Skill
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round of battle, Army units receive 40% Indestructible (1 round).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks dealing 150% damage to 1 random enemy each.
heroSkill.passive: When deployed, your other Army heroes have a chance to increase the amount of Magnetic Pulse they apply via skills by 1.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Rohr's skill effect (without increasing the triggering chance of the passive skill or the effect).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Indestructible duration +1 round. Active skill attack count +1.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Indestructible +10%. Magnetic Pulse bonus from passive raised to 2.

heroSkill.name: Skyfire Shower
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round of battle, Army units receive 40% Indestructible (1 round).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from each Army unit, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks dealing 130% damage to 1 random enemy each.
heroSkill.passive: After this hero's active skill triggers, all units gain 5% Decreased Damage Taken (cap 40%).

exclusiveLevels.lv5: Indestructible duration +1 round. Active skill attack count +1.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Indestructible +10%. All Army units gain 15% HP Boost.

spotlight.intro: This week, we're excited to introduce the next new hero—Ella—and reveal her skills! Just like Franziska, Ella can be obtained for free through the upcoming New Hero System via exchange.

heroSkill.name: Mag-Storm Volley
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round of battle, Army units receive 115% Attack Enhancement, which lasts for the entire battle.
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from each Army unit, there is a chance to trigger 4 skill attacks, each dealing 70% damage to 1 random enemy unit. If the hit target has Magnetic Pulse, it detonates all Magnetic Pulse on the target. This hero's active skill prioritizes targets with Magnetic Pulse.
heroSkill.passive: When deployed, all Magnetic Pulse effects are enhanced by 70%.

exclusiveLevels.lv5: After detonating Magnetic Pulse, chance to apply 1-2 stacks of 50% Magnetic Pulse to target. While deployed, all Magnetic Pulse +50%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Active Skill attack count +1. Lv.5 Magnetic Pulse stacks raised to 2-4.

spotlight.intro: Nova, our upcoming new hero, is ready to show off her skills!

heroSkill.name: Starwave Pulse
heroSkill.preparation: Round 1: your Army units gain 55% HP Boost (entire battle). Front-2-row Army gains 2 stacks of 25% Hostile (entire battle, stacks reset to initial Hostile each round). Front-2-row Army gain 1 stack of Resistance.
heroSkill.passive: When Hostile is active, triggers 1 counterattack dealing 95% damage to enemy with lowest current HP%. If unit uses up all Hostile stacks during counterattack, +1 extra hit of 20% damage to lowest-HP enemy. When defending, bonus damage hits increase to 3 times.

exclusiveLevels.lv5: Hostile applies to ALL Army units. Hostile counterattack damage +25%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Army units +40% HP Boost. Hostile counterattack damage +50%.

spotlight.intro: Dressed in her lab coat and armed with cutting-edge formulas, this Army Hero turns science into strength.

heroSkill.name: Vengeance Serum
heroSkill.preparation: Round 1: Army units receive 115% Attack Enhancement (entire battle).
heroSkill.passive: When deployed, +35% Hostile counterattack damage to all heroes. If counterattack hits enemy below 30% HP, +50% extra damage.

exclusiveLevels.lv5: +28% Hostile counterattack damage to all heroes. Chance Hostile not consumed (max 6 times/round).
exclusiveLevels.lv7: +47% Hostile counterattack damage. Bonus passive triggers when hitting enemies below 50% HP (was 30%).

spotlight.intro: Shen Suyu — Naval hero. Available Feb 6, 2025.

heroSkill.name: Tidecaller's Melody
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round of battle, Naval units receive 66% HP Boost (entire battle).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from each Naval unit, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks dealing 130% damage to 1 random enemy each. If hit target has Abnormal Status, each type of Abnormal Status increases skill damage by 10% (cap 30%).
heroSkill.passive: After every regular attack from each Naval unit, chance to apply 15% Vulnerable stack. If active skill hits a unit with Abnormal Status, all units gain 5% damage increase + 5% damage reduction (cap 25%).

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Shen Suyu's skill effect (without increasing active skill trigger chance, abnormal-status damage boost, or passive effect).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Passive Vulnerable applies to up to 3 enemies, effect raised to 20%. Active skill abnormal-status damage raised to 15%/type (cap 45%).
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Active skill +2 extra attacks. Abnormal-status damage raised to 25%/type (cap 75%).

spotlight.intro: Alvida — fearless Naval Hero. Available September 11, 2025.

heroSkill.name: Hero Skill
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round of battle, Naval units receive 40% Indestructible (1 round).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from each Navy unit, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks dealing 95% damage to 1 random enemy each.
heroSkill.passive: After active skill: 15% Debilitation to 3 random enemies for 1 turn. 15% Light Armor to 3 of your units. 15% Heavy Armor to 3 of your units. Effects prioritize units without corresponding effects.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Alvida's skill effect (without increasing passive Light Armor and Heavy Armor effects).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Indestructible duration +1 round. Passive applies Debilitation/Light Armor/Heavy Armor to 4-5 units.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Indestructible +10%. Active skill attack count raised to 5.

heroSkill.name: Full Analysis
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round, Naval units gain 105% Attack Enhancement (entire battle). Naval units gain 30% Concentration (damage cap 240%, entire battle). Each round start: Naval units gain 1 stack of 50% Heavy Armor.
heroSkill.passive: Each time Damage Reduction Shield reduces damage and consumes a stack, all units gain 10% Decreased Damage Taken (cap 80%).

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Lilia's skill effect (without increasing Concentration, Heavy Armor, or Decreased DMG Taken effect).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Heavy Armor stacks raised to 2. All hero skills with Splash strike main target +1 time.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Concentration raised to 60%. All hero skills' Splash damage +30%.

spotlight.intro: Margaretha, our brand-new naval hero, is ready to set sail.

heroSkill.name: Microfilm Intel
heroSkill.preparation: Round 1: Naval units receive 110% Attack Enhancement (entire battle).
heroSkill.passive: Start of each round: Silence applied to 3 random enemies for 1 turn. 30% Debilitation to 3-5 random enemies for 1 turn. 30% Vulnerable to 3-5 random enemies for 1 turn.

exclusiveLevels.lv5: Debilitation/Vulnerable +40%. All heroes' active skill damage +10% to abnormal-status targets.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Vulnerable +20%. Active skill damage +30% to abnormal-status targets.

spotlight.intro: Command the waves with a new force—Sinope is joining the fleet!

heroSkill.name: War Manual
heroSkill.preparation: Round 1: Naval units receive 40% Indestructible (1 round).
heroSkill.active: After every Navy regular attack, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks, each dealing 110% damage to 1 random enemy.
heroSkill.passive: After active skill: applies 15% Debilitation to 4-5 random enemies for 1 turn + 15% Vulnerable to 4-5 random enemies for 1 turn (prioritizes uncrowned targets).

exclusiveLevels.lv5: Indestructible duration +1 round. Passive Debilitation raised to 30%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Indestructible +10%. Active skill attack count raised to 5.

spotlight.intro: A new naval force is rising—Lophy is on his way!

heroSkill.name: Mirage Beam
heroSkill.preparation: Round 1: Navy +72% HP Boost (entire battle). +1 stack of 50% Light Armor at start of each round.
heroSkill.active: After Navy regular attacks, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks, each dealing 95% damage to 1 enemy + 40% Splash to other units in column. Each Damage Reduction Shield type boosts splash by 20% (cap 240%).
heroSkill.passive: Each Damage Reduction Shield type on Navy boosts Decreased DMG Taken by 15% (cap 240%). >1 type → splash triggers 1 extra time on main target.

exclusiveLevels.lv5: Preparation Light Armor stacks raised to 2. Decreased Damage Taken per shield type raised to 60%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Splash also affects all units in same row. Each shield type +40% splash damage.

spotlight.intro: Carna — Air Force hero. Available March 20, 2025.

heroSkill.name: Storm Barrage
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round of battle, Air Force units receive 73% HP Boost (entire battle) + 15% Vitality (3 rounds).
heroSkill.passive: Front-2-row Air Force units have a chance to trigger Combo Attack 1-3 times when attacking. If multiple Combo Attacks trigger in same round, each additional activation +5% Combo Attack damage for 1 turn.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Carna's skill effect (without increasing Combo Attack chance, Vitality, or passive effect).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Combo Attack trigger chance raised to 100%. Multi-trigger damage bonus raised to 10%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Combo Attack count changed to 2-4. Vitality effect +15%.

heroes.name: Joan Mature
heroes.note: Discord post spelled 'Joan Matire' — partial match with client hero #336 'Joan Mature'.

spotlight.intro: Joan Mature — Air Force hero. Available October 16, 2025.

heroSkill.name: Hero Skill
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round, Air Force units receive 125% Attack Enhancement + 30% Combo Attack damage boost (entire battle), and 30% Vitality (3 rounds).
heroSkill.passive: When 3rd-row Air Force units survive, other Air Force units in the same column gain 30% Combo Attack DMG Increase.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Joan Mature's skill effect (without increasing Vitality, prep skill, or passive Combo Attack DMG Increase).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Prep Combo Attack effect +40%. Passive Combo Attack DMG Increase +30%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Prep Combo Attack effect +60%. Air Force units' Attack Enhancement +52%.

spotlight.intro: Heid — Air Force hero. Available December 18, 2025.

heroSkill.name: Hero Skill
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round, Air Force units receive 40% Indestructible (1 round) + 30% Vitality (3 rounds).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from each Air Force unit, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks dealing 160% damage to 1 random enemy each.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Heid's skill effect (without increasing active skill trigger chance or Vitality).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Indestructible duration +1 round. Air Force units gain 30% Combo Attack damage boost.

spotlight.intro: Hero of May — Jett. Available May 15, 2025.

heroSkill.name: Skyrift Shadow
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round, Air Force units receive 78% HP Boost (entire battle).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from Air Force units, chance to trigger skill attack dealing 50% damage to all enemy units. If target affected by Ignition, chance to apply 1 stack of Ignition (30%) to 1 random enemy adjacent to target.
heroSkill.passive: End of each round: enhances Ignition based on Ignition stacks resolved this round. Every 5 resolved Ignition stacks +5% all Ignition damage (cap +15%, entire battle). Skill-detonated Ignition does not count.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Jett's skill effect (without active skill trigger chance, Ignition application, or passive effect).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Round start: Ignition (50%) to 3 enemies. Passive change: every 5 resolved Ignition stacks +20% (cap +60%).
exclusiveLevels.lv7: When deployed, all Ignition +40%. Active skill damage +70% to Ignition targets.

spotlight.intro: Vivian — Air Force hero. Available December 12, 2024.

heroSkill.name: Remote Command
heroSkill.preparation: In the first round, Air Force units receive 40% Indestructible (1 round).
heroSkill.active: After every regular attack from each Air Force unit, chance to trigger 3 skill attacks. Prioritizes enemies without Ignition, dealing 100% damage per attack and applying 15% Ignition. If target already has Ignition, +10% extra skill damage.

exclusiveLevels.note: Improves Vivian's skill effect by 34% (without active skill trigger chance, Ignition effect, or damage increase effect).
exclusiveLevels.lv5: Indestructible duration +1 round. First round: Air Force units gain 35% Vitality (2 rounds).
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Indestructible +10%. Active skill attack count +1. Active skill damage +100%.

spotlight.intro: Franziska — first hero spotlight! 'This new hero will not require a purchase and can be obtained through the New Hero System.'

heroSkill.name: Blazing Blade
heroSkill.preparation: Round 1: Air Force +135% Attack Enhancement (entire battle).
heroSkill.passive: When Air Force regular attacks hit a target with this hero's Ignition, applies 30% Ignition to 2 other random enemies. Each successful application: all your units +10% Damage Increase (cap 300%). Start of each round: 30% Ignition on 3 random enemies.

exclusiveLevels.lv5: Hero's Ignition raised to 120%. Passive Damage Increase per application raised to 30%.
exclusiveLevels.lv7: Hero's Ignition raised to 130%. Air Force units gain +32% Attack Enhancement.

heroAssociation.summary: Hero Association — 5-hero club / themed Association feature found in client. Currently has 1 theme (1001) gated server-side. Banner asset on remote CDN.
heroAssociation.tableSize: 1 theme × 5 heroes; hero_association_honor_level has 250 entries (50 levels × 5 heroes), ~5,000 shards each to max

heroVoicePack.summary: New G123-only voice pack feature. 497 voice lines. Cross-platform hero_voice TABLE retains 528 lines from older system.

verifiedFalseAlarms: Vulnerable / Silence / Ignition: ALL pre-existing battle effects (48/54/many lang hits). Initial reviewer flag of 'new mechanics' was wrong.
Hero 119 = 'Silence' the character (existing recruit hero), not the silence-status mechanic

investigationJourney.summary: Three-phase investigation: independent game-data dump for any unreleased New Hero System hooks → reviewer pushback + corrections → Discord cross-reference covering all 13 Rivergame posts.

phases.label: Independent game-data dump
phases.what: Investigated the live game client by dumping all 1280 TABLEs, resolving lang strings, and extracting assets via cc.resources.load + GL readPixels. Looking for anything related to the announced New Hero System.
found: 13 of 18 Core Lineup heroes already have entries in the client hero TABLE (existing heroes the system will support)
5 Core Lineup heroes are still completely absent from client tables: Nova, Tannis, Sinope, Lophy, Joan Mature
hero_association TABLE — separate, server-gated 5-hero club feature (not part of New Hero System)
hero_voice_pack — new G123-only voice pack TABLE (not New Hero System)
phases.initialConclusion: Game client has not yet loaded the Heroes Awakening / Heroes Exchanging assets. 5 brand-new Core Lineup heroes are still pending.

phases.label: Reviewer pushback + corrections
phases.what: User and reviewer agents challenged claims; verified each against raw data files.
corrections: Vulnerable / Silence / Ignition referenced in spotlight skills are pre-existing battle effects — not new mechanics
Hero 119 = 'Silence' (a recruit-hero character), not the silence-status mechanic
13/18 Core Lineup mapped (not 11) — re-checked against live hero TABLE

phases.label: Discord cross-reference
phases.what: User logged in via Playwright; scraped every Rivergame Admin post about the New Hero System across 3 channels (Jan 8, 2026 → Apr 24, 2026).
phases.keyDiscovery: Rivergame has published 13 individual posts: 1 teaser + 1 intel + 1 Q&A + 7 hero spotlights + 2 awakening-skill image reveals + 1 final announcement. Spotlights cover 7 of the 18 Core Lineup heroes. Older release posts for the other 11 existing heroes (Sara, Rohr, Marvingt, Shen Suyu, Alvida, Lilia, Carna, Joan Mature, Heid, Jett, Vivian) predate the New Hero System and are still pending collection.
crossRefResults: 24/24 Exchange Pool heroes confirmed by client hero IDs
13/18 Core Lineup mapped to client IDs
5 brand-new heroes (Nova, Tannis, Sinope, Lophy, Joan Mature) — pending in client
All 6 Hero Combo splits confirmed: 2 Army × 3 + 2 Navy × 3 + 2 Air × 3

hyperAwakening.loreName: The new Awakening project led by Dr. Gero
hyperAwakening.summary: Patch 2026-05-15 (server 2864): the awakening pipeline went LIVE in the client for the first 6 of 18 planned heroes. Each awakened hero gets a fresh persona, 4 awakening skills, an ultimate awakening skill, awakening bust artwork, and an 'Awakening Stone' currency (item 88000001) that powers skill upgrades.
hyperAwakening.researcher: Dr. Gero (in-lore lead researcher who designed weapons + modifications for each awakened hero)

currency.name: Awakening Stone
currency.description: Used to upgrade Awakening Skill Tiers and enhance activated skill effects. Brimming with immense, stable energy, this item unlocks the deeper potential of Awakening. Each skill level costs 2 stones (Lv.1) ramping up to 10 stones for higher tiers.

perHeroCard.description: Hero-specific item that unlocks that hero's powerful Awakening Skill (one per Phase I hero, IDs 44300001–44300006).

hyperAwakening.exclusiveSkillSynergy: Hitting Exclusive Skill Lv.7 unlocks a stronger applied-buff variant for every awakening skill (the 21_x1101 family is replaced by the 21_x1101 family — visible on every Phase I row).

phases.label: Awakening Phase I — Awakening Time
phases.rewardPolicy: 1 awakening item available immediately on phase open; the remaining 5 unlock on a 7-day cadence; backlog accumulates if not collected.

awakenedHeroes.name: Sara
awakenedHeroes.bio: During a covert operation, Sara found herself nearly encircled by flanking enemies. In a split second, she spotted a vulnerability in their formation and launched a preemptive strike, successfully breaking through the siege. This pivotal moment eradicated her deep-seated insecurities, drastically elevating her battlefield awareness and making her increasingly bold in combat. In the Star City campaign, she repeatedly utilized stealth to close in on enemies and initiate devastating ambushes. To complement Sara's evolved tactical approach, Meowzilla and Dr. Gero developed and upgraded an all-new assault vehicle for her, "Awoo". Today, Sara handles the reconnaissance, while Awoo brings the firepower.
awakenedHeroes.cardDescription:
Used to awaken Hero Sara and unlock her powerful Awakening Skill.
Her battlefield perception suddenly awakened during a breakout, transforming Sara from an insecure Prowler into a fearless Saboteur.

awakenedHeroes.name: Nova
awakenedHeroes.bio:
Her bond and training with the Enigma Beasts significantly bolstered Nova's strength. Not only did she claim the championship at the latest combat tournament, but she also shattered Maximo's record.
Eager to share the good news with her beast companions, she arrived only to find a scene of chaos: people fleeing in terror from a stampede of berserk Enigma Beasts. This time, Nova did not turn and run. Her body reacted instinctively, resonating with a strange power. Runes flashed in her pupils, instantly covering her body and radiating outward as a gale-force wind swirled around her. In the next moment, the opposing herd calmed down as if sedated, returning to normal.
awakenedHeroes.cardDescription:
Used to awaken Hero Nova and unlock her powerful Awakening Skill.
When the astromarks emerge, Nova's power transforms into a sweeping storm to quell any frenzy.

awakenedHeroes.name: Shen Suyu
awakenedHeroes.bio: The fan, a cherished heirloom of Shen Suyu's family, was forged from a crystal brimming with Enigma. As Enigma surged across the land, Suyu persistently attempted to merge her energy with the fan, yet the key always eluded her — an uncharacteristic source of anxiety for someone so composed. During a fierce battle aboard the Starship, the cabin she was guarding came under heavy fire. Suddenly, the fan erupted with brilliant light, its surface weaving with mysterious patterns. Suyu felt a surge of energy within her body, resonating with the fan like never before. As the skirmish raged outside, the haunting memory of the Hua Fleet's destruction resurfaced in her mind. Her energy poured into the fan like a burst dam. Following a heaven-piercing pillar of flame, her cabin was safely defended.
awakenedHeroes.cardDescription:
Used to awaken Hero Shen Suyu and unlock her powerful Awakening Skill.
Her ancestral fan unleashed the flames of Enigma in a critical moment. Shen Suyu protected her comrades and convictions with the Phoenix Blaze.

awakenedHeroes.name: Lophy
awakenedHeroes.bio: After joining SMG, Lophy sought refuge from the ravages of war by diving into the Deep Sea, finding solace in the abyss. However, during an underwater clash between a sperm whale and a giant squid, his curiosity got the better of him. Recklessly approaching the skirmish, he was struck by the whale's tail fin and swept into a massive undercurrent. When he awoke, the sight of an ancient shipwreck and rocks inscribed with glowing runes made him realize he had stumbled upon the ruins of the lost civilization he had been searching for. To his astonishment, strange, luminous patterns now adorned his own body. By the time he fully regained his senses, Lophy found himself drifting peacefully on the ocean's surface.
awakenedHeroes.cardDescription:
Used to awaken Hero Lophy and unlock his powerful Awakening Skill.
The flickering mysterious light in the deep-sea ruins granted Lophy power transcending the water's surface, birthing the Neon Shark.

awakenedHeroes.name: Carna
awakenedHeroes.bio: Carna's burst state was one of the earliest phenomena Dr. Gero researched, leading her to participate in the new "Hyper Awakening" project. Unlike other awakened individuals, Carna's transformation is highly manageable. Instrument data revealed that upon entering her awakened state, her physical capabilities skyrocket, accompanied by periodic fluctuations in her energy levels. Consequently, Dr. Gero designed a customized weapon for her: Energy Cannon. This firearm stores her energy at its peak, guaranteeing a stable and devastating output in all her future battles.
awakenedHeroes.cardDescription:
Used to awaken Hero Carna and unlock her powerful Awakening Skill.
By precisely capturing the periodic fluctuations of energy within her body, Carna has mastered the power of thunder.

awakenedHeroes.name: Jett
awakenedHeroes.bio: Surviving numerous close calls in the Monster Domain convinced Jett that he needed a serious gear upgrade. Drawing inspiration from Titan Gear, Dr. Gero drafted a comprehensive modification plan. During a wind tunnel test, Jett nearly lost control in the gale-force winds. In a sudden flash of insight, he sensed the shape of the airflow and instinctively adjusted his posture to move with it, rather than fighting the air pressure. He had truly mastered aerodynamics and gravity! It wasn't until the system chimed "Danger Cleared" that he realized he had just survived a life-or-death trial.
awakenedHeroes.cardDescription:
Used to awaken Hero Jett and unlock his powerful Awakening Skill.
In a split second of life and death within the wind tunnel, Jett learned to master airflow and gravity, transforming into a silver-winged lightning bolt.

queuedHeroes.name: Ella
queuedHeroes.bioNote: Awakening bio already in lang pack (Lee Yewon precision-volley scene), but persona label + ultimate skill name + card still pending.
queuedHeroes.awakeningDesc: Facing Lee Yewon's relentless precision volley, Ella's world narrowed down entirely to her bow and arrow. With defeat looming just inches away, she held her breath and honed her senses. Instead of fixating on her target, she shifted her focus to the flight paths of the incoming arrows. Time seemed to slow, and vivid, gray trajectories materialized in the air before her eyes! Guided by this surreal instinct, her arrow slipped silently from the bowstring, riding the anticipated trajectory to cleave Yewon's incoming shaft perfectly in two. Ella stared in disbelief at the back of her hand, where delicate, glowing green patterns resembling leafy vines were slowly fading away...

buffSystem.summary: Each awakening level grants 4 buffs from the 521xxx 'per-row' family — front/mid/back row variants plus a global HP. Six families exist (Army/Navy/Air × ATK/HP/DMG/DEF/DEF Taken). Per-row scaling: 300 → 900 (10× tier).

521081.name: Air Force Decreased DMG Taken (front row)

521082.name: Air Force Decreased DMG Taken (mid row)

521083.name: Air Force Decreased DMG Taken (back row)

itemsEconomy.summary: Hyper Awakening introduces 4 distinct item types. The Awakening Card unlocks a specific hero's awakening (one card per Phase I hero, 6 cards total this phase, 18 lifetime across Phase I/II/III). Awakening Stones are the universal skill-XP currency used to level each of the 4 awakening skills from Lv.1 to Lv.10. Hero Shards (existing currency) drive the 40-level base awakening ladder. Phase reference items (88000001/2/3) are the in-event chest pointers.

items.name: Awakening Stone
items.role: Levels individual awakening skills (Lv.1 to Lv.10). Skill EXP table cites 2-10 stones per skill level. Universal across all heroes.
items.obtained: Drops from Awakening Choice Chest (1 chest immediately on phase open, 5 more on 7-day cadence — 6 total per phase, no expiry on backlog)

items.name: Nova Awakening Card
items.role: Unlocks Nova's Awakening (one-time). Required to flip her status from 5★ Lv.120 to Awakened.

items.name: Lophy Awakening Card
items.role: Unlocks Lophy's Awakening (one-time). Required to flip his status from 5★ Lv.120 to Awakened.

items.name: Jett Awakening Card
items.role: Unlocks Jett's Awakening (one-time). Required to flip his status from 5★ Lv.120 to Awakened.

items.name: Carna Awakening Card
items.role: Unlocks Carna's Awakening (one-time). Required to flip her status from 5★ Lv.120 to Awakened.

items.name: Shen Suyu Awakening Card
items.role: Unlocks Shen Suyu's Awakening (one-time). Required to flip her status from 5★ Lv.120 to Awakened.

items.name: Sara Awakening Card
items.role: Unlocks Sara's Awakening (one-time). Required to flip her status from 5★ Lv.120 to Awakened.

items.name: Phase I Reward Reference
items.role: Internal pointer in hero_awakening_batch row 1 (the Awakening Time event). Surfaces as 'Awakening Stone' in the event-rewards panel — actual currency delivered is the matching per-batch hero awakening card.

perHeroProgression.summary: After awakening, each hero levels from 0 to 40 using the existing Hero Shard currency (item 38002NNN) plus a hero-specific Exclusive Skill EXP token (38003NNN). The skill ladder uses Awakening Stones separately.

phaseDeferred.items_44300007_to_44300018: Phase II/III awakening cards. Item rows EXIST but lang names are still None and icons fall back to allianceTD_unit_part placeholders. Will resolve when server flips Phase II/III on.
phaseDeferred.items_88000002_and_88000003: Phase II/III event pointer items. Lang names None today; icons reuse generic item assets. Decoded indirectly via hero_awakening_batch rows 2 and 3.
phaseDeferred.items_38002_for_phase23_heroes: Hero Shards already exist for all 12 queued heroes (Marvingt, Alvida, Vivian, etc.) — they are pre-existing game items, not new with this patch.

levelTable.source: Cumulative Awakening Fight Power + per-pull and per-level shard costs across the 40-level ladder.
levelTable.note: Gold Shard + ES Skill columns show the per-hero items needed per pull. Each level requires 5 pulls (100 EXP / 20 EXP per pull). Each hero uses their own Hero Shard and their dedicated Exclusive Skill chip — see the per-hero items table for the pairing.

perHeroItems.source: Per-hero pairing of Hero Shard + Exclusive Skill chip used in awakening pulls. Max level is 40 for every awakening hero.

rules: Once the event begins, Commanders can preview the heroes available for Awakening this phase.
A free Awakening Card Chest can be claimed at regular intervals, up to 6 in total.
Each Awakening Card Chest contains Awakening Cards for the current phase featured heroes, which can be used for Awakening.
Each type of Awakening Card may only be selected once per Chest.

phase1HeroRoles.334: Jett: DPS in Air Force's Ignition
phase1HeroRoles.234: Shen Suyu: DPS in Navy's Control Tactic
phase1HeroRoles.333: Carna: DPS in Air Force's Regular Attack
phase1HeroRoles.169: Sara: DPS in Army's Dynamic Attack
phase1HeroRoles.239: Lophy: DPS in Navy's Defense Tactic

stoneRewardBundles.note: The single-stone bundle is what you redeem 1-for-1 with Grand Slam Vouchers (up to 6,000 stones per event). The Medium and Large packs aren't sold in any in-game shop — they show up as VIP / recharge / mail attachments, so the only way to confirm a USD price for those two is the live in-game shop UI.

heroGrandSlam.description: During the event, each Grand Slam Token spent gives you Action Points. After receiving Action Points, your Soldier piece moves forward to explore the board, claiming rewards or triggering events on the corresponding squares.
heroGrandSlam.genre: Board-game / Monopoly-style. Spend Tokens to roll, advance your Soldier around a tiled board, and land on either reward squares or special-event squares.

260508001.name: Grand Slam Token
260508001.role: Primary currency. Spent each move to gain Action Points. Players keep unused Tokens for future events.

260508002.name: Grand Slam Voucher
260508002.role: Exchange currency earned by landing on reward squares and completing activity events. Spent in the Grand Slam Exchange Store. Carries over between events.

260509003.name: Proof of Awakening
260509003.role: Sub-event progress currency for the "Path of Awakening" lane inside Grand Slam. Stocks for high-end exchanges (Universal ES Shard, EXP Books).

tileEventTypes.name: Universal Magnet
tileEventTypes.desc: Auto-collects rewards from every Item Square along your path during your next move.

tileEventTypes.name: Free Draw
tileEventTypes.desc: Next dice roll is free, or for x10 the cost drops by one Token.

tileEventTypes.name: Surprise Reward
tileEventTypes.desc: Pops a bonus reward chest on the spot — typically grants Grand Slam Vouchers (10/20/40/15/30/100 depending on tile).

tileEventTypes.name: Bonus Progress
tileEventTypes.desc: Adds extra Action Points so the Soldier sprints further on the next move.

exchangeStore.highlight: Up to 6,000 Awakening Stones available per event at 1 Voucher = 1 Stone — the primary way to convert event progress into hero awakening fuel.

paidPacks.source: The USD/JPY tier ladder ($0.99/$1.99/$4.99/$8.99/$19.99/$49.99/$99.99 mapped to ¥160/¥320/¥650/¥1300/¥2700/¥7000/¥13900) is the universal Top War pack pricing — used across most paid event packs, not just Grand Slam. Token counts for the Special Pack are pulled from the live in-game shop. The $1.99 token count is interpolated and tagged for verification.
paidPacks.note: Each tier grants Grand Slam Tokens — the dice-roll currency you spend each move on the board. Lower USD tiers give the best Tokens-per-dollar value; the $99.99 tier stacks up to 6 purchases per day for higher daily ceiling.
paidPacks.jpyNote: JPY values are the universal Top War Japan pricing ladder (a tier or two below Apple's standard JP brackets — Top War prices their packs aggressively in Japan). Players outside Japan can sometimes redeem via Top War Gold Blocks plus a VPN — check the official Discord for the current method.

phase23EsSkillRule.rule: Each Phase II/III hero needs 10 chips of their dedicated Exclusive Skill chip to unlock that hero's Exclusive Skill. Same 10-chip rule for all 12 deferred heroes.

heroSwap.summary: The in-game name for Heroes Exchanging. A 7-day swap event that lets players trade an old hero (Exchange Pool) for a Phase I/II/III target hero of the same army type. Every swap is irreversible and limited to once per target.

tooltips.text: Hero {0} has untransferred Talents. Proceeding with the swap will reset these Talents, and their materials will not be refunded. Continue anyway?
Hero {0} is already selected. Please choose a different target hero.
Select a hero to swap first.
The upgrade materials returned from the swapped hero will be 100% converted into the target hero's materials.
Upon a successful swap, the original hero's development will be reset to 1-star Lv. 1.
Each target hero can only be swapped once!
Attention! Hero swaps are irreversible! Each target hero can only be swapped once!

Upon a successful swap, the original hero's development will be reset to 1-star Lv. 1.
All related development materials will be 100% converted into the target hero's materials.

criticalRules: Hero swaps are IRREVERSIBLE — there is no undo button.
Each TARGET hero can only be swapped ONCE per player per phase.
Source hero gets RESET to 1-star Lv. 1 (its progression goes away).
All upgrade materials from the source hero (Lv.1 shards, exclusive skill shards, etc.) are 100% converted to the target hero's materials.
Untransferred Talents on the swapped hero are reset — and the talent materials are NOT refunded. The game asks you to confirm this explicitly.
Heroes must match army type: Army↔Army, Navy↔Navy, Air↔Air. The filter chips at the top of the swap panel are 'Army Hero / Naval Hero / Air Force Hero'.
If the target hero is already at the same position as a selected source, the system shows 'Hero {0} is already selected. Please choose a different target hero.'
Heroes not in the Base cannot be swapped — get them home from any march or task first.
uiFlow: 1. Open the Hero Swap panel (entry point: the 'Hero Swap' tab on the awakening event).
2. Filter by army type chip (Army / Naval / Air Force).
3. Tap a source hero from your Exchange Pool — its avatar moves into the 'Swapped Hero' slot.
4. Tap a target hero from the Phase I/II/III lineup — its avatar fills the 'Target Hero' slot.
5. The 'Swap Preview' card shows side-by-side: what you LOSE (source hero state) vs what you GAIN (target hero + 100% material conversion).
6. Hit 'Swap' → confirmation dialog: 'Attention! Hero swaps are irreversible! Each target hero can only be swapped once!'
7. 'Swap Successful' toast + 'Swap resources received.' confirmation. Source hero is now 1-star Lv.1; target hero gains all converted materials.
